title: Xpeng Inc (XPEV) Stock in Focus: November 2025 Deliveries, Q3 Earnings Shock, and 2026 Outlook
text: XPeng reported November 2025 deliveries of 36,728 units with a 19% year-over-year increase, though month-over-month deliveries declined 12.6%. Cumulative January to November 2025 deliveries reached 391,937 units, up 156% year-over-year. Overseas deliveries from January to November reached 39,773 units, marking a 95% year-over-year increase. Q3 2025 earnings delivered a shock to the positive side with the company achieving its lowest quarterly loss in 5 years at RMB 380 million, representing 78.93% year-over-year loss reduction. For 2026, the company faces analyst scrutiny with mixed sentiment on whether it can sustain profitability while managing slowing growth. Despite strong recent operational metrics, guidance disappointments caused significant stock declines.
